summary: Truth-Lens app project. Rebuilding with watermark removed and an admin panel featuring user management, content/submission moderation, and site configuration.

existing_features.title: Remove any remaining watermark or Caffeine branding from all visible UI surfaces, including the landing page, scan dashboard, results page, header, and footer.

Build a full admin dashboard UI accessible only to authenticated admin users, containing three tabbed sections: (1) User Management — a table of all registered users with name, principal ID, scan count, and ban/delete actions; (2) Submission Moderation — a table of all scan submissions with content preview, verdict, confidence, timestamp, and a delete action; (3) Site Configuration — a settings form allowing admins to edit and save configuration values such as max scans per user and feature toggles.

Update the admin login page to clearly indicate the admin access path and display a helpful error message when a logged-in user does not have admin privileges, with an option to log out and try a different identity.

new_feature_requests.summary: Admin panel with user management, content/submission moderation, and site configuration

Expand the backend to support admin-specific operations: listing all registered users with their profiles, banning or removing users, viewing all scan submissions with metadata, deleting flagged submissions, and reading/writing site configuration key-value settings (e.g., max scans per user, feature flags).
